name: Forest Avenue Pharmacy
description: Your neighborhood pharmacy serving Forest Avenue for over 20 years. Prescription services, immunizations, and health consultations.

name: La Bella Trattoria
description: Authentic Italian cuisine crafted with family recipes. From house-made pasta to wood-fired pizzas, dine in or take out.

name: Forest Ave Hardware
description: Full-service hardware store with a knowledgeable staff. Tools, paint, plumbing supplies, and expert advice for every project.

name: Sunrise Diner
description: A Forest Avenue institution since 1978. Breakfast served all day, homemade soups, and the best coffee on the North Shore.

name: North Shore Barbers
description: Classic cuts and modern styles for men and boys. Walk-ins welcome. Open seven days a week.

name: Green Thumb Florist
description: Fresh-cut flowers, custom arrangements, and plants for every occasion. Same-day delivery available throughout Staten Island.

name: Forest Ave Dry Cleaners
description: Expert garment care with same-day service available. Alterations, leather cleaning, and wedding gown preservation.

name: Island Books & Gifts
description: Independent bookstore specializing in local Staten Island authors, children's books, and thoughtful gifts. Story time every Saturday morning.

name: Forest Avenue Dental
description: Comprehensive family and cosmetic dentistry in a comfortable, welcoming environment. Accepting new patients.

name: Café Verdi
description: Specialty coffee, fresh pastries, and light lunch fare. A cozy neighborhood café with free Wi-Fi and community seating.

name: All-Star Auto Repair
description: Full-service auto repair and maintenance. ASE-certified mechanics, honest estimates, and a comfortable waiting area.

name: Westside Insurance Group
description: Personal and commercial insurance solutions. Home, auto, life, and business coverage from a team that knows the community.

name: Angelina's Bakery
description: Handmade Italian pastries, custom cakes, and fresh bread baked daily. A family tradition for over three decades on Forest Avenue.

name: StateSide Realty
description: Residential and commercial real estate serving Staten Island. Buying, selling, and renting—our agents know every block of the borough.

name: Children's Boutique
description: Curated children's clothing, toys, and accessories. Newborn through size 14. Perfect for gifts, back-to-school, and everyday.
